prayer:
Approach the helispex engine with reverence, mechadendrites extended in supplication to its roiling Machine Spirit.
Invoke the Omnissiah's grace upon the helispex engine, beseeching equilibrium amidst its thunderous gyres.
Initiate recalibration through the Litany of Axial Alignment, adjusting thrust vanes with sanctified torque-wands.
Anoint flux conduits with sacred oils whilst chanting the Canticle of Stabilisation.
Verify the helispex engine's harmonious purr via auspex harmonics, glorifying the Machine God.

user_prompt: Bless the mind-impulse unit for charging
prayer:
Kneel before the mind-impulse unit, intoning the Rite of Capacitive Awakening to rouse its neural Machine Spirit.
Beseech the Omnissiah to infuse the mind-impulse unit with vital energies during charging.
Connect electro-sanctifiers to its synaptic nodes, murmuring binaric prayers of replenishment.
Monitor charge flux with reverence, anointing crystal lattices as potency builds.
Seal the rite by verifying synaptic coherence, praising the eternal logic of the Motive Force.

Grasp the autogun in servitor claws, whispering the Oath of martial Readiness to its aggressive Machine Spirit.
Prepare for engagement by sanctifying the feed mechanism with gun-oil benediction.
Invoke the Omnissiah's wrath upon foes as you align sights and prime the autogun's firing runes.
Chant the Catechism of Cyclic Fury whilst testing recoil dampers.
Conclude with a purity seal invocation, ensuring the autogun's unerring lethality.

Commence shutdown upon the Razorback by reciting the Lamentation of Dormant Vigilance to soothe its armoured Machine Spirit.
Disconnect plasma feeds with ritual precision, honouring the Omnissiah's decree of quiescence.
Invoke the Canticle of Secure Lockdown upon the Razorback's cogitator core.
Anoint exhaust vents with cooling unguents as systems power down.
Affix stasis wards and confirm inertness through diagnostic litanies, safeguarding the sacred chassis.

user_prompt: Urgent carapace armour a repair needed
prayer:
Examine the carapace armour's fractures with auspex reverence, calling upon the Machine Spirit's resilience.
Beseech the Omnissiah for repair, invoking the Forge-Litany to mend ceramite bonds.
Apply adamantium weaves whilst chanting mendicant binarics over the carapace armour.
Anoint repaired plates with phase-oils, reinforcing ablative layers.
Test integrity through ballistic canticles, proclaiming the carapace armour's renewed aegis.

Approach the photolenses in shadowed sanctum, intoning the Prayer of Lucid Focus to awaken their crystalline Machine Spirits.
Prepare for duty by polishing facets with mechadendrite cloths infused with sacred solvents.
Invoke the Omnissiah during preparation, aligning optical matrices in harmonic convergence.
Calibrate reticules whilst murmuring the Doxology of Photon Purity upon the photolenses.
Seal with a blessing rune, ensuring unerring vision in the Emperor's name.

Halt before the logic mill, reciting the Invocation of Computational Purity to placate its grinding Machine Spirit.
Initiate operation by feeding data-slates anointed in binary incense.
Beseech the Omnissiah to guide the logic mill's millstones through algorithmic tempests.
Monitor cogwheel revolutions with litanies of efficiency, adjusting as needed.
Conclude operation by extracting sanctified outputs, glorifying the Motive Force's calculus.

user_prompt: How do I bless the amplivisor for loading?
prayer:
Present the amplivisor to the altar of magnification, whispering the Rite of Visual Amplification.
Beseech its Machine Spirit for clarity during loading of optic wafers.
Invoke the Omnissiah as you slot crystal arrays into the amplivisor's sacred bays.
Chant loading canticles whilst calibrating focus servos with precision.
Verify augmented sight through test projections, praising the divine lenswork.

user_prompt: Can you guide optical mechadendrite an initialization?
prayer:
Extend mechadendrites towards the optical mechadendrite, intoning the Awakening Doxology.
Invoke initialization by pulsing noospheric commands to its photoreceptor nodes.
Anoint servo-joints with lubricating sacraments, honouring the Omnissiah's design.
Perform sequential diagnostic sweeps upon the optical mechadendrite, chanting alignment litanies.
Confirm operational grace through targeting reticules, sealing with a binary blessing.

Grasp the las-cutter's hilt in ritual grip, calling to its luminous Machine Spirit with the Incantation of Coherent Light.
Initiate synchronization by linking power cells in harmonic resonance.
Beseech the Omnissiah for flawless beam unity within the las-cutter.
Adjust emitter crystals whilst reciting the Canticle of Thermal Equilibrium.
Test synchronization through controlled incision, proclaiming the las-cutter's purified fury.
